description: Complete monitoring with 3-sensor NFT temperature tracking, freeze risk, solar heating analysis, Vista CA climate optimizations, flow trend analysis, daily volume tracking, temperature in °F, alert state panels, and hardware watchdog monitoring

options.content:
# 100W Solar System

**Hydroponic Garden Power System**

- 1x 100W Monocrystalline Panel
- Renogy Rover 20A MPPT Charger
- 2x 35Ah 12V SLA Batteries (70Ah total)
- Raspberry Pi Zero (RS232)
- 18W Aerator
- 4.2W Water Pumps
- Prometheus + Grafana Monitoring

**Status:** Real-time monitoring with health tracking and fault detection

panels.description: Shows charge state transitions throughout the day
panels.title: Charge State Timeline

panels.description: All temperature sensors in Fahrenheit: Renogy (controller, battery - converted from °F), NFT system (reservoir, drain, outdoor via DS18B20), and enclosure air (BME280)
panels.title: 🌡️ System Temperatures (All 6 Sensors)

panels.description: Temperature increase from sun heating exposed NFT pipes. Positive values normal in daytime. Typical peak: +5-15°F at 2pm. If consistently >20°F, add shade cloth.
panels.title: ☀️ NFT Solar Heating Effect

panels.description: Inlet vs outlet flow difference. Some imbalance is NORMAL for NFT (evaporation). Alert triggers at >0.25 L/min sustained. Hot days: 0.15-0.25 L/min evaporation is typical.
panels.title: 💧 Flow Imbalance Monitor

panels.description: Alert when outdoor <35°F AND reservoir <45°F. Rare in Vista (1-2 nights/winter). Ground burial provides protection.
panels.title: ❄️ Freeze Risk Monitor (Vista CA)

panels.description: Vista CA: 70% is normal morning fog. Yellow at 70% (watch), Orange at 80% (unusual), Red at 85% (investigate ventilation).
panels.title: 💧 Enclosure Humidity

panels.description: Triggers when flow imbalance >0.25 L/min sustained for 5+ minutes.
panels.title: 🚨 Leak Alert

panels.description: Shows current mode with temperature adjustment. Examples: normal-75F, reduced (low battery), disabled.
panels.title: 🫧 Aeration Mode

panels.description: Inlet and outlet flow rates (smoothed). Inlet typically slightly higher due to NFT evaporation.
panels.title: 💦 Water Flow Rates

panels.description: Battery SOC from Renogy solar controller. Waterflow script mirrors this value for load shedding decisions.
panels.title: 🔋 Battery State of Charge

panels.description: Raspberry Pi CPU temperature. Normal: <140°F, Warning: 140-158°F, High: 158-176°F, Critical: >176°F (throttling starts at 176-185°F)
panels.title: 🌡️ Pi CPU Temperature

panels.description: Current CPU utilization (5 min average). Pi Zero should be <50% normally, Pi 4 can handle more.
panels.title: ⚡ CPU Usage

panels.description: RAM usage. Shows actual used memory (excluding cache/buffers). Pi Zero: ~512MB, Pi 4: 1-8GB
panels.title: 💾 Memory Usage

panels.description: SD card / root filesystem usage. Keep below 85% to avoid performance issues.
panels.title: 💿 Root Disk Usage

panels.description: Load average (1/5/15 min). Should stay below CPU count (dashed red line). Pi Zero: 1 core, Pi 4: 4 cores. Load >CPU count = system struggling.
panels.title: 📊 System Load Average

panels.description: Network traffic (receive up, transmit down). Typical: <100 KB/s. Spikes during Prometheus scrapes or downloads.
panels.title: 🌐 Network Traffic

panels.description: Time since last reboot. Grafana displays as seconds/minutes/hours/days automatically.
panels.title: ⏱️ System Uptime

panels.description: Ramdisk usage (where Prometheus metrics are written). Typically very small.
panels.title: 💾 /ramdisk Usage

panels.description: CPU temperature over time. Pi throttles at 176-185°F. Good ventilation keeps it <140°F.
panels.title: 🌡️ CPU Temperature History
⚡ Charging Current
panels.description: Solar panel input current vs battery charging current. MPPT steps up battery-side current relative to panel-side current during active charging.
Flow trend analysis: smoothed inlet, 1h/24h rolling averages, and raw sensor readings
panels.title: Flow Trend Analysis

panels.description: Flow degradation trend: 1=current flow significantly below 24h baseline
panels.title: Flow Trend Degraded

panels.description: Total water volume circulated today
panels.title: Daily Water Volume (L)

panels.description: 1=pump recovery was attempted for current low flow event
panels.title: Pump Recovery Attempted

panels.description: All temperature sensors in Fahrenheit
panels.title: Water Temperatures (°F)

title: Solar & Hydroponic NFT System - Complete Monitoring
